input:
Its guard asked ʿAmr when he saw him approaching: “What do you want?” ʿAmr told him that he wanted to destroy Suwāʿ and the guardian tried to persuade him not to do so for his own safety. ʿAmr said to him: “You are still as ignorant as ever.” Saʿīd ibn Zayd was sent to destroy another main idol, Manāt, which was worshipped by the tribes of Madinah before they became Muslims. Thus, the marks of idolatry were removed from Makkah and the surrounding area, and the majority of the people of Makkah became Muslims.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 35: A Conquest of Hearts

output.scene_title: ʿAmr's Failed Attempt to Destroy Suwāʿ
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 35: A Conquest of Hearts

characters.name: ʿAmr ibn al-ʿĀṣ
characters.appearance: Early 40s, dark complexion, athletic build. Strong jaw, sharp eyes, neatly trimmed beard. Wearing a simple white thobe, plain brown leather cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Confident, resolute demeanor.

characters.name: Unknown Guard
characters.appearance: Middle-aged, light brown skin, average build. Thin beard, simple head cloth. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, brown woolen cloak. Leather sandals. Worried, cautious expression.

output.moral_lesson: Patience and perseverance are key to achieving one's goals, and sometimes, the right moment to act has not yet arrived.
output.narrative_text: ʿAmr ibn al-ʿĀṣ wanted to destroy the idol Suwāʿ, but the guard tried to stop him, reminding him of the dangers. ʿAmr was not deterred, but another task was given to Saʿīd ibn Zayd to destroy the idol Manāt.

compliance.notes: No idols shown in detail, no graphic violence. Suwāʿ mentioned, but not depicted.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Exterior of a 7th century Makkah mud-brick home. A young man with dark complexion, athletic build, strong jaw, sharp eyes, neatly trimmed beard, wearing a simple white thobe, plain brown leather cloak, white cloth wrapped as head covering, standing with a determined look on his face, talking to an older man with light brown skin, average build, thin beard, simple head cloth, wearing off-white thobe, brown woolen cloak, looking worried. Distant background, palm trees and hills of Makkah visible. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
